infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: BHOS needs camera access to scan medication barcodes and capture incident documentation photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: BHOS needs photo library access to attach images to incident reports and daily logs.

infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: BHOS uses Face ID for secure authentication and medication administration verification.
